# Smart Checkout Widgets

> Shopify Plus checkout app for automatic gifts, customer-choice rewards, upsells, BOGO, trust badges, payment customization, and Thank You / Order Status content.

## Product

- **Name:** Smart Checkout Widgets
- **Site:** https://smartcheckoutwidgets.com/
- **Shopify App Store:** https://apps.shopify.com/smart-checkout-widgets
- **Built by:** Thought Bulb (https://thoughtbulb.dev)
- **Support:** admin@thoughtbulb.dev

## Who it is for

Shopify Plus merchants (and all stores for Thank You / Order Status content widgets) who want checkout-native gifting and merchandising without coupon-code friction.

## Core capabilities

- Automatic free gifts at checkout thresholds
- Customer-choice gift selection
- Checkout upsells
- BOGO and automatic discount campaigns in checkout
- Trust badges, banners, accordions, custom fields
- Payment method hide, rename, reorder (Shopify Plus)
- Thank You and Order Status page content widgets (all Shopify stores)

## Pricing (summary)

See https://smartcheckoutwidgets.com/pricing.md for structured tiers.

- **Starter:** Free to install; up to 100 orders
- **Growth:** $29/month or $290/year; 7-day trial; up to 1,000 orders
- **Advanced:** $59/month; 7-day trial; up to 5,000 orders
- **Plus / enterprise:** Contact for higher volume

Public listing: https://apps.shopify.com/smart-checkout-widgets

- https://smartcheckoutwidgets.com/compare/shopify-checkout-gift-apps.html
